item.title: Style Guide: see what this theme looks like

item.description: Azure Monitor Queries for Firewall Rules.

item.title: Markdown Syntax Tutorial
item.description: The source markdown of John Gruber’s Markdown Syntax page.

item.title: About
item.description: A Hugo theme with Tailwind CSS. Prerequisites You’ll need git and npm installed. Make sure to install postcss-cli and autoprefixer globally in your environment, as Hugo Pipe’s PostCSS requires it. 1 npm install -g postcss-cli autoprefixer Make sure to use a minimum Hugo version of v0.69.0 and above. Installation Go to the root directory of your Hugo website, or create a new site with 1 2 3 hugo new site hugo-example-site cd hugo-example-site git init Now you can add the theme with

item.title: Deep Learning
item.description: Authored by the 2018 Turing Award winners.
